content.playstyle: Core Resonance builds as allies use Ultimates, granting Saber fixed Energy. Enhanced Skill becomes available with enough Resonance stacks, dealing high bouncing Wind DMG. Ultimate (Excalibur) costs 360 Energy — highest in the game — but deals devastating AoE burst. Plan rotations around feeding Saber energy through ally Ultimates and supports.
content.important_traces: Crown of the Star: Gains CRIT DMG based on energy threshold. Knight of the Dragon: 20% innate CRIT Rate. A2: Gains Core Resonance when allies use Ultimates. A6: Excess Energy mechanic allows overcapping.

title: Silver Wolf LV.999 — Imaginary Elation DPS

content.overview: 5-star Imaginary Elation DPS. Speed-scaling damage dealer who ramps via Punchline stacks converted to Hidden MMR. At 60 MMR, enters Godmode Player state with enhanced Basic ATK (massive multi-hit bounces) and Elation Skills. One of the strongest DPS in the game. Requires Elation teammates to function optimally.

content.playstyle: Skill deals AoE Imaginary DMG and generates 5 Punchline. Talent converts Punchline to Hidden MMR at 1:1. At 60 MMR, Ultimate enters Godmode Player — advances action 100%, deploys Zone, unlocks Enhanced Basic ATK (multi-hit bounces) and Enhanced Elation Skill. During Godmode, allies consuming SP in Zone can trigger Top Loot Boxes (AoE Imaginary Elation DMG). Excess CRIT Rate above 100% converts to CRIT DMG.
content.important_traces: A2 (False End Speedrun): Converts ATK into Elation% (up to 120% at 4400 ATK). A4: Enhanced Basic bounces scale with Hidden MMR. A6 (McAwolfee 999): Global passive — if any enemy inflicts CC on an ally, all allies gain Firewall (CC immunity 1 turn). Works even when not in active party.
